title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Teaching Faculty/ Senior Resident Posts
short_info: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Associate Professor / Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 23-05-2026 on the official website www.esic.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Associate Professor / Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.esic.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
